question: <statistical method>
description: Extract all statistical methods explicitly reported. No brackets.

question: <variables>
description: Extract all unique variables from both Independent Variable Unit and Dependent Variable Unit columns. Strictly no brackets.

question: <independent variables>
description: Extract all independent variables explicitly reported in the Independent Variable Unit column. Strictly no brackets.

question: <dependent variables>
description: Extract all dependent variables explicitly reported in the Dependent Variable Unit column. Strictly no brackets.

question: <variables> <scale> <unit>
description: Extract all unique variables from both Independent Variable Unit and Dependent Variable Unit columns together with their explicitly reported measurement scales and units. Strictly following the original text.

question: <independent variable> <dependent variable>
description: Extract all unique independent–dependent variable pairs that were explicitly tested for correlation or association. Brackets removed from variable names.

question: <independent variable> <dependent variable> <statistical method>
description: Extract all atomic relationships between independent variables and dependent variables, paired with the single statistical method used.

question: count - <statistical method>
description: For each study, count the number of unique core statistical methods reported in the Association Test Method column.

question: count - <variables>
description: For each study, count the number of unique variables appearing in both the Independent Variable Unit and Dependent Variable Unit columns (union of both columns, brackets removed).

question: count - <independent variable>
description: For each study, count the number of unique independent variables reported in the Independent Variable Unit column (brackets removed).

question: count - <dependent variable>
description: For each study, count the number of unique dependent variables reported in the Dependent Variable Unit column (brackets removed).

question: count - <independent variable> <dependent variable>
description: Count the total number of UNIQUE (distinct) independent variable (IV) – dependent variable (DV) pairs across all papers in this collection.

question: list - <independent variable> <dependent variable> (<effect size> > 0.7)
description: List all individual relationships where the reported effect size (absolute value) is greater than 0.7.

final_list: [2] Recreation - land cover alone -> Recreation - land cover + population + access (0.81)
